jsonLd.title: Senior Teacher - Byju's - Growth Opportunity
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Senior Teacher looking for your next big career move? Byju's in Lucknow offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Byju's:
Byju's is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Participate in school events, workshops, and training programs
• Maintain classroom discipline and create a positive learning environment
• Conduct parent-teacher meetings and update parents on student performance
• Design formative and summative assessments aligned to learning objectives
• Participate in teacher training and professional development programs
• Monitor student progress and provide timely feedback
• Support students with special educational needs

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Arch / M.Arch from recognized institution
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in LMS Platforms
• Proficiency in Lesson Planning
• Proficiency in Pedagogy
• Proficiency in Child Psychology
• Proficiency in Student Assessment
• Proficiency in Curriculum Development
• Proficiency in Communication Skills
• Proficiency in Classroom Management

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Flexible working hours
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Lucknow, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Byju's!
